why: CHART: box floor 7275 broke decisively - two bars below it, new day low 7265.3 with 10:55 closing on its low, 5-min momentum accelerating down -0.24%, price round-tripped whole AM gain, below VWAP. GEX CONFIRM: net near-spot gamma collapsed +59M(10:36)->+7M = pin spent/levels no longer holding; 7275 floor absorbed, harness stepped nearest floor down to 7250; king 7325 far overhead. Target 7250 floor. Exit on reclaim of 7275 (bear-trap) or gamma re-firming.

THESIS BROKEN: 11:00 bar V-reversed off 7258.67 (near 7250 target) and closed at its high 7273.9 - bullish hammer reclaiming the 7275 floor and my entry. 5-min momentum flipped positive +0.12%. 7250 floor held, positive-gamma levels-hold reasserted, net gamma steady +8M (no negative-gamma flush materialized). Hit my pre-set exit rule (reclaim of 7275). Cut small.

CHART: floor-reclaim bounce - price V-reversed off 7258 (11:00 hammer), 11:05 closed strong 7280.7, reclaimed 7275, now 7278.6 with 5-min momentum positive and 15-min improving (-0.29->-0.11). GEX CONFIRM: harness re-established 7275 pika as floor (+8.0M) directly beneath = tight stop reference; net near-spot gamma firming +7M->+14M; no wall until king 7325 (~47 pts room); positive-gamma regime backs mean-reversion up (every floor held today). Target VWAP 7296 -> box center 7300-7310. Exit on decisive break back below 7275.

TARGET REACHED + STALL: mean-reversion long achieved its objective (7275 floor -> tagged VWAP 7296.2 on 11:15 high) then rejected and closed below VWAP at 7288. 5-min momentum stalled to flat, net near-spot gamma collapsed +32M->+5M (up-thrust unbacked), classic positive-gamma VWAP round-trip. Hit my trail rule (close below VWAP 7295). Cap the 0DTE winner rather than give it back toward the floor.

CHART: floor-bounce long - price tested 7275 (low 7277.4) and held cleanly, now turning up 7279.1, 5-min momentum flattened -0.02%. GEX CONFIRM: 7275 pika is the strongest floor of the day (+12.3M) and still GROWING (1mД+0.5) directly beneath = tight stop; held without poking below (stronger than prior tests); no wall until king 7325 (~46 pts room); positive-gamma levels-hold backs the bounce. Target VWAP 7295 -> box center 7300-7310. Exit on decisive break below 7275.

STOP HIT / THESIS BROKEN: 7275 floor (strongest of the day +12.3M) got absorbed - 13:00 bar broke it, low 7268.8, closed at its low; harness reassigned floor down to 7250. My pre-set exit was a decisive break below 7275, now hit. Even the strongest floor failing under neutral gamma (+2M) opens downside. Discipline over hope - cut the small loss rather than hold for a bear-trap; re-enter only on a clean reclaim of 7275.

CHART: confirmed bear-trap reclaim - 7268.8 poke reversed, 13:05 closed at its high 7278.9, reclaimed 7275, 5-min momentum +0.03% turning up, 15-min improving -0.24->-0.08. GEX CONFIRM: 7275 pika now STRONGEST floor of the day (+13.1M, growing +0.6/min) = dealers defending it hard, directly beneath as tight support; no wall until king 7325; positive-gamma regime. Same pattern as my winning T2, now with the confirmation T3 lacked. Target VWAP 7295 (cap there). Stop on decisive break below 7268 bear-trap low.

REGIME FLIP - confirming regime flipped POSITIVE->NEGATIVE gamma (net near-spot -2M, levels break/trending). My floor-bounce long relied entirely on positive-gamma levels-hold; that basis is invalidated. Also price broke back below 7275 (floor absorbed again, node moved to 7250). Method says exit when the confirming regime flips - cut now (-0.08%) before a negative-gamma flush toward 7250.
